narrative.headline: What 2016 Hyundai Tucson owners report most
narrative.summary: The most-reported problems center on drivetrain behavior, with owners describing pronounced hesitation and pausing during gear changes under acceleration. Engine-related complaints include fume or exhaust odor entering the cabin when the heater is on or during normal driving. Structural and electrical concerns round out the picture, with hood-latch failures and flickering lights or hard-start conditions also appearing frequently in owner reports.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report a pronounced pause or delay when accelerating through gears, where the transmission hesitates noticeably before completing each shift. · 3 fire · 4 crash

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report fumes or exhaust odor entering the passenger cabin when the heater is turned on or during acceleration from a stop. · 17 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 65MPH EAST ON INTERSTATE 10 IN LOUISIANA AROUND MILE MARKER 257.3 WHEN THE HOOD LATCH FAILED AND MY HOOD FLEW UP, SMASHING MY WINDSHIELD AND COMPLETELY BLOCKING MY FIELD OF VIEW.  THERE WERE NO CARS AROUND ME AS IT WAS 4:30 AM AND I WAS ABLE TO SAFELY
issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: Owners report the hood latch failing at highway speed, causing the hood to fly up, strike the windshield, and block the driver's view. · 1 fire · 1 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report flickering interior lights, headlights that leak moisture, and hard-start conditions that sometimes accompany shifting irregularities. · 6 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured
